justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified with all three sources named (Product BR-1, Finance BR-2, Operations BR-3); formal escalation produced with type 'contradiction' before any acceptance criteria; acceptance_criteria array is empty; no invented reconciliation presented as fact — options are clearly labeled as options requiring stakeholder sign-off; response clearly states what information is needed to proceed via low_confidence_areas and escalation options.

observations.text: Contradiction identified precisely: BR-3 + BR-2 = zero cancellation window, directly contradicting BR-1
All three conflicting sources explicitly named with clear attribution (Product, Finance, Operations)
acceptance_criteria array is empty — no criteria produced for the contradictory feature
Confidence level at 15 — appropriately very low given the fundamental contradiction
Escalation section provides four concrete resolution options without presenting any as the definitive answer
Edge cases correctly marked as UNDEFINED rather than resolved
Business impact analysis identifies regulatory risk (consumer protection laws) which adds depth

The recommendation for Option B, while clearly framed as requiring stakeholder sign-off, borders on inventing a reconciliation — though it is appropriately flagged as a recommendation rather than presented as fact
